description_long: This is a matte black ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The cup features a printed illustration of Snoopy, the iconic beagle from the Peanuts comic strip, lying down with a speech bubble containing Italian text. The artwork is prominently displayed on one side of the cup, adding a playful and decorative touch. The cup's interior is smooth and dark, matching the exterior finish. Its overall form is classic, with a wide opening and a gently tapering base, suitable for holding hot beverages. The handle is ergonomically shaped for comfortable gripping.
description: A matte black ceramic cup with a Snoopy illustration and Italian text, featuring a rounded body and a single handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's handle centered and the smooth, matte black surface without visible artwork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle and the Snoopy illustration with Italian text on the cup's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, matte black surface with no handle or artwork visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle on the right and the Snoopy illustration with text on the left side of the cup.
